scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names server,web "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build:production: npm run build:web && npm run build --workspace @hermes-studio/server
scripts.build:desktop-assets: npm run build:web && npm run bundle:server && npm run bundle:web-for-desktop
scripts.bundle:server: esbuild apps/server/src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=apps/desktop/src-tauri/resources/server/hermes-studio-server.mjs
scripts.bundle:web-for-desktop: rm -rf apps/desktop/src-tauri/resources/web && mkdir -p apps/desktop/src-tauri/resources/web && cp -R apps/web/dist/. apps/desktop/src-tauri/resources/web/
